steps.title: Define the skateboard trick
steps.content: The first sentence names a trick called a 900. The next sentence explains what that trick is: launching off a ramp, rotating 900 degrees, and landing back on the ramp.

steps.title: Choose a clarifying transition
steps.content: A and B signal contrast, but the second sentence is not opposing the first. C signals earlier timing, but the sentence defines the trick rather than describes a previous event. The answer is D.
